## 🐛 Description

A clear description of what's wrong on the site.

> ℹ️ Issues about the **course materials themselves** belong in the
> [Kai-Course-Notes repository](https://github.com/kaiiiichen/Kai-Course-Notes/issues) instead.

## 📄 Page

Which page? (e.g. https://kai-course-notes.kaichen.dev/)

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Scroll to '...'
3. See the problem

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to see.

## 🖥️ Environment

- Device: (e.g. iPhone 15, MacBook)
- Browser: (e.g. Safari 19, Chrome 140)
- Color scheme: light / dark
- Viewport: mobile / desktop

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable.
